notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Dylan Cease, assist to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Chase Meidroth scores. Munetaka Murakami to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Dylan Cease, assist to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Chase Meidroth scores. Munetaka Murakami to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw grounds out, third baseman Miguel Vargas to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: George Springer reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Davis Schneider scores.

notableEvents.label: George Springer reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: George Springer reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Davis Schneider scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill singles on a bunt ground ball to catcher Tyler Heineman. Miguel Vargas scores. Derek Hill to 2nd. Derek Hill advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Tyler Heineman.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill singles on a bunt ground ball to catcher Tyler Heineman. Miguel Vargas scores. Derek Hill to 2nd. Derek Hill advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Tyler Heineman.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters singles on a line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Derek Hill scores.
